chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 1091 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 21-12-2022 Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondents-Town Committee, Padidan a/w Ghulam Shabir Jatoi, Town Officer (respondent No.5). Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G-Sindh. ***** Learned counsel for the respondent No.5 (Town Officer, Padidan) submits that so far service benefits of the deceased son of the petitioner are concerned, that has already been released and paid so also monthly pension is being paid to the petitioner regularly; however, financial assistance amounting to Rs.12,00,000/- (Twelve Lac) could not be paid to Balach Lakho, son of deceased employee as he is minor. He further states that the respondent No.5 is ready to deposit aforementioned amount with the Accountant of this Court. Let said amount be deposited by the respondent No.5 with the Accountant of this Court within 30-days hereof. In case, amount is deposited, the Accountant shall invest the same in any profitable bearing government scheme for the ultimate benefit of the minor son of the deceased employee, who shall be entitled to receive the said amount along with profit on being attaining the age of majority. Let compliance report be submitted by the respondent No.5 to this Court through Additional Registrar. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
